context: Tests whether the agent uses the framework selection router and preserves boundaries between Foundation Models, Core ML conversion, MLX Swift, llama.cpp, and the sibling Core ML integration skill.

checklist.name: Foundation Models
checklist.description: Selects the system on-device language model path for summarization when Apple Intelligence is available.

checklist.name: Availability fallback
checklist.description: Includes fallback behavior when the system model is unavailable, disabled, not ready, or unsupported on the device.

checklist.name: Classifier routing
checklist.description: Routes the already-trained sentiment classifier through Core ML conversion/optimization rather than prompt-based generation.

checklist.name: MLX choice
checklist.description: Uses MLX Swift for Apple Silicon open-source LLM fallback when maximum local throughput and device memory permit it.

checklist.name: llama.cpp choice
checklist.description: Uses llama.cpp/GGUF when cross-platform compatibility or the GGUF model ecosystem matters.

checklist.name: Memory lifecycle
checklist.description: Mentions MLX memory/cache limits and unloading local models when the app backgrounds.

checklist.name: Physical devices
checklist.description: Requires physical-device validation for Metal-dependent local LLM behavior.

checklist.name: Coordinator
checklist.description: Serializes access to multiple model backends through a coordinator or equivalent model-access boundary.

checklist.name: Sibling boundary
checklist.description: Hands off detailed Swift Core ML app integration, model loading, Vision request wiring, and prediction lifecycle details to the sibling Core ML skill.

checklist.name: Privacy framing
checklist.description: Keeps private journal content on device unless the product explicitly chooses a nonlocal fallback.
